user.title: Orbit B-Hyve BLE Sprinkler
user.description:
Enter your B-Hyve device details.

To get your network key, run the included `bhyve.py setup` wizard from the scripts/ directory.

Discovered devices: {discovered}

WARNING: Do NOT update your B-Hyve firmware — it may break compatibility.

error.invalid_key: Network key must be 32 hex characters (16 bytes)
